seoTitle: Johnston County Schools Calendar 2026-2027: Dates, Holidays & PDF
seoDescription: View the Johnston County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar with the first and last day, holidays, breaks, early dismissal dates, no-school days, and printable PDF.
calendarNotes: This page covers the traditional JCPS student calendar. Routine staff-only labels are simplified unless they affect student attendance.

calendarFaqs.q: Does JCPS have early dismissal days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 Johnston County Public Schools traditional calendar lists early dismissal for students on December 18, 2026, March 12, 2027, and May 26, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Quarter Breakdown
yearNumbers.detail: Q1 through Q4 total 169 instructional days on the adopted student calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Additional No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes Labor Day, September 25, October 19, November 3, Veterans Day, January 4, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Presidents Day, and March 15. Break periods and early-dismissal days are excluded.

yearNumbers.label: Student Half Days
yearNumbers.detail: The adopted calendar marks early dismissal for students on December 18, March 12, and May 26.

whatsNew.title: What's New for 2026-2027
content: Comparison uses the traditional student calendar for both school years.
The first day moves from August 4 in 2025-2026 to August 24 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from May 18 in 2025-2026 to May 26 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break runs March 26-April 5, 2027 and includes Good Friday on April 2.

events.name: Last Day of School — Early Dismissal

sourceVersion: 2026-2027 student calendar shown as adopted December 9, 2025
